arts.ttl: Birmingham City vs Wrexham TV stream, kick-off time and team news
arts.sum: Blues were, of course, relegated from the Championship last season and Wrexham were promoted from League Two. Birmingham City’s match against Wrexham has been given top billing on Monday night by Sky Sports.

arts.ttl: Chris Davies opens up on Birmingham City striker situation with message to Stansfield and May
arts.sum: After the Walsall game, where Stansfield occupied the central striker position with May slightly deeper, Davies stated that he wants to play the former Fulham forward on the last line of opposition defences. On the eve of Blues’ game with Wrexham, Davies said of Stansfield: “He’s a player that can play as a nine, or he can play as a winger as he did against us for Fulham, but if he’s a winger he is one that comes inside more and makes out to in runs.

arts.ttl: 'I'm an ex-Man Utd star – Wrexham's success pains me but Ryan Reynolds is doing great'
arts.sum: Wrexham have flourished since being taken over by actors Ryan Reynolds and Rob McElhenney with the club now currently sitting top of League One following successive promotions

arts.ttl: Lee starts: Wrexham team news and predicted XI to face Birmingham City

arts.ttl: Birmingham warned over record Jay Stansfield transfer ahead of 'Hollywood' Wrexham clash
arts.sum: Former Birmingham City favourite Clinton Morrison believes his old club have become an instant target for their League One rivals after splashing some serious cash in the summer transfer window

arts.ttl: Birmingham City will be without five injured players against Wrexham
arts.sum: Blues will be without Ethan Laird and Luke Harris after the pair suffered ankle injuries in the win over Wigan Athletic before the international break. Giving an update on Laird and Harris, Davies said: “Ethan has a knock to his ankle, the same as Luke Harris, so they both look like they are going to be out for a little while now.

arts.ttl: Ryan Reynolds and Rob McElhenney branded 'monsters' as Wrexham chief makes promise
arts.sum: Wrexham executive director Humphrey Ker has agreed to run a marathon after promising to do so when the idea was first suggested at a club AGM meeting earlier this year

arts.ttl: Ryan Reynolds' net worth compared to Tom Brady as Wrexham face Birmingham City
arts.sum: Wrexham and Birmingham may not be the first places that come to mind when you think of Hollywood, but a pair of celebrity icons will be watching on as their sides face off

arts.ttl: Ayumu Yokoyama reveals what ‘annoyed’ him after Birmingham City transfer
arts.sum: “I always ask Tomoki ‘what did they say?’ at a meeting when discussing tactics,” Yokoyama said in a sit-down interview with Blues TV. Ayumu Yokoyama has set his sights on the Premier League after an exciting start to his Birmingham City career.
